statements.select: select sysid CODE,prgname TEXT from amfuncm where modules = '' order by prgorder

select prgid CODE,prgname TEXT from amfuncm where modules <> '' and submodules = ''
and sysid = #sysid#
order by prgorder
SELECT a.CODE, a.TEXT FROM CODE1 a WHERE a.ITEM='UNIT' AND a.CODE!='0' ORDER BY a.KEY1, a.CODE
SELECT a.CODE, a.TEXT FROM CODE1 a WHERE a.ITEM='UNIT' ORDER BY a.KEY1, a.CODE
SELECT GRPID AS CODE, GRPNAME AS TEXT FROM AMGRP
SELECT MODULES AS CODE, PRGNAME AS TEXT FROM AMFUNCM WHERE SYSID=#SYSID# AND MODULES<>' ' AND SUBMODULES=' ' AND PRGID=' ' ORDER BY PRGORDER

SELECT CAST(a.Seq as NVARCHAR) AS CODE ,CONCAT(a.MeetingName ,' (',YEAR(a.MeetingDateS)-1911,FORMAT(a.MeetingDateS,'/M/d') ,'~',YEAR(a.MeetingDateE)-1911,FORMAT(a.MeetingDateE,'/M/d') ,')') AS TEXT FROM Meeting a WHERE a.SignUpDateE>=GETDATE() $SelfSelect$
SELECT CourseUnitCode AS CODE ,CONCAT('【',CourseUnitCode,'】',CourseUnitName) AS TEXT FROM CourseUnit WHERE Actived='Y' ORDER BY CourseUnitCode, OrderBy
SELECT JobAbilityCode AS CODE ,CONCAT('【',JobAbilityCode,'】',CourseUnitName ) AS TEXT FROM CourseUnit WHERE Actived='Y' ORDER BY JobAbilityCode, OrderBy
SELECT IndustryCode AS CODE, IndustryName AS TEXT FROM IndustryMst WHERE Actived='Y' ORDER BY OrderBy
SELECT EduLevel AS CODE, EduName AS TEXT FROM Edu WHERE Actived='Y' ORDER BY OrderBy
SELECT ExpertiseCode AS CODE, ExpertiseName AS TEXT FROM Expertise WHERE Actived='Y' ORDER BY RIGHT(concat(REPLICATE(N' ', 10),ExpertiseCode),10)
SELECT DISTINCT Year AS CODE,CAST(CAST(Year AS INT)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) AS TEXT FROM Report ORDER BY Year ASC
SELECT JobAbilityCode AS CODE, JobAbilityCode + ' ' + JobAbilityName AS TEXT FROM JobAbility WHERE Actived='Y' ORDER BY OrderBy

SELECT a.CODE, a.TEXT FROM CODE1 a WHERE a.ITEM='DISTID'
AND a.CODE=#DISTID#
ORDER BY a.KEY1, a.CODE
SELECT a.CityCode as CODE ,CONCAT(a.CityName,'全區') as TEXT FROM CITY a WHERE a.CityCode !='999' ORDER BY a.OrderBy
